race.comment: WHERE'S MY SOCK (10) resumed and found the line nicely beaten a short head over 975m at Swan Hill when coming back from a break. Picked up impressively in that and the longer sprint will suit this time around. Draws inside and will be hard to stop. WILD RUBY (11) improved last start, doing her best work late over 1200m at Echuca, beaten only a head. Gives away starts but has John Allen on for the first time, and she should be storming home. RECYCLE KING (6) resumed at Kyneton over 1106m, beaten 3.5 lengths. Had to do it the hard way from a wide gate and draws awkwardly again. Has the ability and can't be ruled out. SILVER MAID (9) debuts and has been well educated. Placed at Ballarat in her most recent jumpout and Coffey sticks from that and the one prior.  Has an awkward gate but deserves consideration.
